name: Personal Electrical Lockout Kit — Pouch
shortDescription: Belt or waist pouch carrying an electrician's complete personal LOTO kit.
longDescription: A compact waist or belt pouch pre-packed with the hardware one electrician needs for routine panel and breaker lockout — hasps, an assortment of MCB and circuit breaker lockouts, personal padlocks, keyrings, a push-button lockout, warning tags and cable ties. Keeps a technician's lockout kit together and on-hand rather than scattered across a tool bag, and is quick to check before a shift for missing items.

images.alt: Personal Electrical Lockout Kit — Pouch supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Typical contents
specs.value: 2 hasps, 8 breaker lockout types, 4 padlocks, push-button lockout, 5 tags, 5 ties, keyrings

specs.label: Custom kits
specs.value: Contents can be tailored to site requirement
